student_attainment_description: Student Attainment measures how well the school performed on standardized tests at a single point in time. This school’s scores are compared to national average scores. A 50th percentile score means the school is performing at the same level as the national average school.
culture_climate_description: Results are based on student and teacher responses to the My Voice, My School 5Essentials survey. For more information on this survey and other measures of school culture and climate visit  https://www.5-essentials.org/ .
healthy_school_certification_1: Students learn better at healthy schools! This school is working towards achieving Healthy CPS. Schools must earn 90% of all criteria to become Healthy CPS. Learn more by visiting  cps.edu/healthycps .
creative_school_certification_1: This school is Strong in the arts. It nearly meets the goals and priorities outlined in the CPS Arts Education Plan, including Staffing & Instruction, Partnerships, Community & Culture, and Budget & Planning. To learn more, visit  http://www.cpsarts.org/ .
supportive_school_award_desc: This school has developed an action plan to support social and emotional learning (SEL). Leaders and staff have assessed their school climate, and they are beginning to adopt best practices to support SEL for all students.
